title: cyclosorus ruber
intro: Cyclosorus ruber, also known as the Red Vase Fern, is a type of species in the family Thelypteridaceae and is a vascular plant native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Cyclosorus ruber include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
